# Sell WBTC

> Sell WBTC — exchange Wrapped Bitcoin for another token on-chain while keeping full control of your wallet and keys.

## Key facts
- Token: Wrapped Bitcoin (WBTC), an ERC-20 representation of BTC on Ethereum and other EVM chains
- Backing / peg: Intended to stay backed 1:1 by BTC held in institutional custody
- Convert: Swap on a DEX for any token; native BTC or fiat needs redemption, an exchange, or an off-ramp
- Networks: Ethereum Mainnet (chain ID 1) plus other chains, each with its own WBTC contract
- Costs: ETH gas, liquidity-pool or protocol fees, price impact, and possibly a disclosed interface fee
- Verify: Check the contract address, not the ticker — a matching symbol proves nothing

- [What is Sell WBTC?](https://sell-wbtc.github.io/#what)
- [Getting in and out](https://sell-wbtc.github.io/#wrap)
- [Swapping it on a DEX](https://sell-wbtc.github.io/#swap)
- [The token vs its native asset](https://sell-wbtc.github.io/#vs)
- [Costs and gas](https://sell-wbtc.github.io/#fees)
- [Is Sell WBTC safe?](https://sell-wbtc.github.io/#safety)
- [Problems and fixes](https://sell-wbtc.github.io/#troubleshoot)
- [FAQ](https://sell-wbtc.github.io/#faq)
